release_summary: GONE badge horizon fix. The availStatus tier (available/contested/unlikely/likely_gone driving the GONE badge in the UI) was using probAvailable (survival to current turn) instead of probAvailableNextTurn (survival to NEXT turn after current). The strategic question is "will he be here if I pass at my current turn?" — that needs next-turn horizon. One-line code change; recommender scoring math unchanged. Effect: more players show GONE late in drafts, correctly reflecting that mid-late picks often disappear over the 7-12 pick wait between user turns.
